answers: Shipping logistics: pick up, warehouse, transport (truck/ship/air), customs (international), last-mile delivery to customer.
International shipping: need customs forms, HS codes, duties may apply. DHL/FedEx for speed, sea freight for bulk.
Tips: compare carriers (UPS, FedEx, USPS), negotiate volume rates, use tracking, and package properly to prevent damage.
Shipping options: standard (3-7 days, cheap), express (1-2 days, costly), freight (bulk, cheapest per unit).
